title: Donut RTP
description: Donut RTP adds a clean /rtp menu for random teleporting across dimensions. Admins can configure RTP settings with /adminrtp.
body:
DonutSMP-RTP 🌍✨
DonutSMP-RTP is a clean, lightweight, and server-friendly random teleport plugin for Paper 1.21.x. It gives players a simple /rtp menu where they can choose between the Overworld, Nether, and End, then teleport to a safe random location with a smooth countdown experience.

The plugin is designed for survival and SMP servers that want RTP to feel polished instead of basic. Players get a GUI-based dimension selector, action bar countdown, sound effects, movement cancellation, and safe-location checks to avoid water, lava, void, and unsafe spawn spots.

Admins can use /adminrtp to configure RTP settings directly in-game. Each dimension can have its own coordinate range, Y-level limits, and enabled or disabled status, with all settings saved automatically to the config file.

Features 🚀
GUI-based /rtp menu 🧭
Supports Overworld, Nether, and End 🌱🔥🌌
5-second teleport countdown ⏳
Action bar timer and sound effects 🎵
Cancels teleport if the player moves too far ❌
Safe random location searching 🛡️
No water, lava, void, or unsafe blocks 🌊
Admin configuration menu with /adminrtp ⚙️
Per-dimension RTP ranges and height limits 📍
YAML config persistence 💾
Built for Paper 1.21.x 📦
Commands 📝
/rtp - Open the random teleport menu
/adminrtp - Open the admin RTP settings menu

Permission 🔐
donutsmp.admin - Allows access to /adminrtp
